title: Delta-first idea pass framing
summary: Objective: choose the next durable child line after the delta-first packet follow-up stabilized. Evidence anchor: latest delta-first follow-up summary on the same 4-frame frozen surface shows delta-only and delta-dominant concat at top-1 0.75 vs weighted sum 0.5 and static target-feature self-match 1.0. Constraints: keep the upstream module frozen, preserve the same bounded comparison contract, avoid reopening codec ranking, and prefer a runnable machine-facing pipeline over a confounded direct VLM demo. Candidate routes under review: wider bounded delta validation, delta-to-frozen-foundation consumer bridge, or a static-context sidecar variant. Success criterion: submit one new durable idea branch whose mechanism, risk, and next experiment package are clearer than the current line. Downgrade criterion: if local consumer feasibility or literature support is too weak, stay with bounded validation rather than forcing a higher-level bridge.
comment: Record explicit stage contract before selecting the next idea line

guidance_vm.summary: Report saved. Turn it into the next explicit route instead of leaving it as passive context.
guidance_vm.why_now: A report is most useful when it directly drives the next durable decision.
complete_when: The report informs a route choice or stage transition.
The next active anchor is clear and durable.

suggested_artifact_calls.name: artifact.record(kind='decision', ...)
suggested_artifact_calls.purpose: Convert the report into a route decision.
